name: Old Fashioned Macaroni & Cheese
recipeIngredient: A few dashes of hot pepper sauce
5 cups (20 oz.) Shredded cheddar cheese, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni in boiling salted water until almost tender.
2. Meanwhile, melt butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
3. Stir in flour, salt, mustard, pepper, and hot pepper sauce. Cook and stir until smooth.
4. Drain the cooked macaroni; add it to the saucepan with the butter mixture. Mix well.
5. Stir in milk and 4 cups of shredded cheddar cheese. Pour into an ungreased 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
6. Sprinkle with remaining cheese. Cover and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes or until bubbly.
7. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
Serves: 12
